title: ManneOps — Enterprise DevOps Platform
tagline: Accelerate software delivery with intelligent automation
description: A comprehensive DevOps platform that unifies CI/CD, infrastructure as code, observability, and security scanning into a single, integrated workflow. ManneOps reduces deployment cycles by 70% while improving code quality and team productivity.

title: ManneAI — Enterprise AI/ML Platform
tagline: Turn data into decisions with responsible AI
description: An end-to-end machine learning platform that accelerates AI adoption from experimentation to production. Feature stores, MLOps pipelines, model monitoring, and explainable AI capabilities built for enterprise scale and governance.

title: ManneSecure — Cyber Defense Suite
tagline: Proactive threat protection for modern enterprises
description: A unified cybersecurity platform combining SIEM, SOAR, vulnerability management, and zero-trust network access. ManneSecure provides 24/7 threat detection, automated incident response, and comprehensive compliance reporting.

title: ManneCloud — Cloud Management Platform
tagline: Optimize, govern, and scale your multi-cloud estate
description: A cloud management and FinOps platform that provides unified visibility, cost optimization, governance, and automation across AWS, Azure, and GCP. Achieve 40% cloud cost reduction while improving security and compliance posture.

title: ManneTrack — Digital Experience Platform
description: A headless digital experience platform (DXP) that enables enterprises to deliver personalized, omnichannel customer journeys. Built on microservices architecture with AI-powered content personalization and real-time analytics.
